description_long: This electric drill features a robust, industrial design with a rectangular body housing three prominent copper coil assemblies on top, each encased in a metallic frame. The main body is constructed from a reddish-brown material, likely metal or reinforced plastic, and includes a pistol-style grip with a green cartridge or battery pack attached at the base. The front of the drill is dominated by a large, cylindrical black barrel, suggesting a heavy-duty or specialized function. The top-mounted coils are connected by visible wiring, hinting at an electromagnetic or high-powered mechanism. The rear section is streamlined, with a blue circular component that may serve as a cooling or power distribution unit. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical elements and a rugged finish suitable for demanding urban or industrial environments.
description: A heavy-duty electric drill with three copper coil assemblies, a large black barrel, and a rugged reddish-brown body with a green battery pack. Exposed mechanical parts and a blue rear component give it an industrial, high-powered look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the three copper coil assemblies, the full length of the black barrel, and the pistol grip with green battery pack.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular black barrel opening and the symmetrical arrangement of the copper coils on either side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the copper coils, barrel, and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the blue circular component, the back of the grip, and the green battery pack, with the copper coils flanking the barrel.
